crs_note: local ENU meters via WGS84 equirectangular about origin_lonlat; EPSG:3857 lengths are inflated by ~1/cos(lat) (~1.285 here) -- use the local-meter affine for physical distances
scale_status: measured from the 3 QGIS ground control points in the .TAB (float meters, no integer-pixel estimate)
loss_semantics: loss_db is per WALL CROSSING: count contiguous runs of a material along a ray as ONE crossing, not per cell
frequency_note: loss values ~2.4-5 GHz band; scale for 3.5 GHz NR if needed
gcp_note: 3 GCPs are nearly collinear and mutually inconsistent at the few-meter level; similarity fit used, residuals above. Add a 4th well-spread GCP in QGIS to tighten the scale.
